title: Replication value of < 0 error being thrown when line should be excluded by if guard

features.name: replication with negative computed count inside conditional guard
features.description: Code should include a replication expression with a computed count inside an if block, where the count evaluates to negative when the guard condition is false

features.name: replication with negative count from parameter subtraction
features.description: Code should include a replication expression where the count is derived from subtracting a larger constant from a parameter that is smaller than the subtrahend

features.name: replication with zero-extent count guarded by else branch
features.description: Code should include a replication expression inside an if-else structure where the count would be zero but the if branch still gets elaborated
